name: George Tucker
abstract: George Andrew Tucker (December 10, 1927, in Palatka, Florida – October 10, 1965, in New York City) was an American jazz double-bassist.

concerts.label: Benefit Concert for the Student Non-Violent Coordinating Committee

about_quotes.speaker: Lou Donaldson
about_quotes.evidence: I went on the road with that group, Horace Parlan, George Tucker and Al Harewood
about_quotes.doc_title: Lou Donaldson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Benny Golson
about_quotes.evidence: We had a bass player for a short while who played with Earl Bostic when I was there, named George Tucker
about_quotes.doc_title: Benny Golson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
